hero.headline: Tailored Trust for Every Industry
hero.subHeadline: GateFlow’s infrastructure is flexible enough to handle the unique security nuances of any gated physical space.

compounds.title: Residential Compounds
compounds.subtitle: Security meets convenience for compound management.
compounds.description: Empower your residents with the new Resident Portal, stop unauthorized contractor entry, and end gate bottleneck frustration.

residents.title: Resident Portal
residents.description: Let owners manage their guests independently with strict compound management quotas.

trades.title: Contractor Tracking
trades.description: Issue recurring QR codes limited by time-of-day for maids, drivers, and maintenance.

complaints.title: End Complaints
complaints.description: Stop holding up VIP residents because security is busy writing down ID numbers.

schools.title: Private Schools
schools.subtitle: Unbreakable perimeter security for educational campuses.
schools.description: Track every pickup and dropoff with precision, managing student release securely across multiple gates.

pickup.title: Secure Pickup
pickup.description: QR validation prevents unauthorized individuals from collecting students.

audit.title: Full Audit Log
audit.description: Know exactly when a parent entered and exited during incidents or disputes.

offline.title: Network Resilient
offline.description: The morning rush must proceed. Offline mode ensures gates stay fast regardless of WiFi connection.

events.title: Mass Events
events.subtitle: Lightning-fast access for high-volume crowds.
events.description: From corporate exhibitions to massive concerts, handle tens of thousands of scans an hour with zero downtime.

speed.title: Rapid Scanning
speed.description: Achieve high throughput scanning with our highly optimized camera pipeline.

fraud.title: Stop Ticket Fraud
fraud.description: Signed QR codes and local DB syncing prevent identical tickets from entering twice.

reports.title: Live Reports
reports.description: View exact attendance counts by gate in real-time.

clubs.title: Exclusive Clubs & Marinas
clubs.subtitle: Discrete, high-end guest management.
clubs.description: Provide a premium check-in experience while enforcing strict seasonal membership and guest pass quotas.

vip.title: VIP Quotas
vip.description: Allocate varying guest pass limits based on membership tiers.

discreet.title: Discreet Scanning
discreet.description: Avoid interrogating high-net-worth individuals at the door with seamless QR validation.

revocation.title: Instant Revocation
revocation.description: Revoke access for bounced memberships globally in under a second.

coreInfrastructure.title: Core Infrastructure
coreInfrastructure.description: All solutions share our hardened core infrastructure, ensuring maximum reliability and security regardless of vertical.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: HMAC-signed QR and AES-256 data encryption at rest.

sync.title: Instant Sync
sync.description: Real-time audit log synchronization between all gates.

mobile.title: Mobile Native
mobile.description: Guard-optimized apps for tablets and mobile devices.

whitelabel.title: White-label Ready
whitelabel.description: Custom branding for developers and property managers.
